title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable now - Allow Once [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: User with HS connected navigates to Find My Device, denies permission, then enables it with "Ask Next Time or When I Share" option, verifying permission popups and settings navigation.
steps: Start the app with the HS (Headset) connected
Tap 'Don't Allow' on the permission popup
Grant location permission with 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' option
expected: Permission popups should display options: "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't Allow". When tapping "Enable Now", the user should be navigated to settings.
keywords: Ask Next Time or When I Share
